name: moda
description: Create and edit brand-aligned designs with Moda's MCP server and REST API skills.

interface.longDescription: Use Moda's MCP server and agent skills to create, remix, export, and live-edit brand-aligned canvases, decks, ads, documents, and graphics.
defaultPrompt: Use Moda to create a brand-aligned pitch deck from this brief.
Use Moda to turn this document into an editable visual report.
Use Moda to open a live canvas editor for this design.
